name: deep-research-codex
description: Codex-native deep research workflow with structured sessions, source-quality checks, and citation-heavy outputs.

interface.shortDescription: Run structured citation-heavy research sessions in Codex
interface.longDescription: Packages the Codex-native deep-research and deep-research-query skills as one product unit. It supports research scoping, durable RESEARCH sessions, source-quality tracking, contradiction handling, and citation-backed reports.
defaultPrompt: Run deep research on this topic and produce a citation-backed report.
Turn this vague topic into a structured research query first.
Resume my existing RESEARCH session and summarize the current evidence.
